sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bitmaps (id UInt32, bitmap_col AggregateFunction(bitmap, UInt32)) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_bitmaps VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3])), (2, bitmapBuild([3, 4, 5]));
UPDATE test_bitmaps SET bitmap_col = bitmapBuild([1, 2, 4]) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, bitmapXorCardinality(bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3]), bitmapBuild([2, 3, 7])) AS res FROM test_bitmaps;
